{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Security Officer",
  "description": "HOP Services is a leading hospitality solutions provider based in Port Harcourt, Nigeria. We specialize in Hospitality Management and Consulting, Professional Bespoke Hospitality Training Programs through HOP Academy, and Comprehensive Cleaning Services via Certified Third parties. Our mission is to keep our environment clean and empower the hospitality sector to deliver high-quality experiences. Serve businesses across Nigeria with guaranteed quality standards, fully trained professional staff, and bespoke packages backed by a guaranteed satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Security Officer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Part-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a disciplined, alert, and experienced Senior Security Officer to safeguard our facilities, staff, and guests on a 24-hour rotational shift basis.
	The ideal candidate brings professionalism, integrity, and a strong sense of duty to everything they do.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and control access to company premises, ensuring only authorized personnel and guests are admitted.
	Conduct regular patrols of all assigned areas &mdash; interior and exterior &mdash; throughout the 24-hour shift cycle.
	Respond promptly and appropriately to security incidents, emergencies, alarms, and disturbances.
	Maintain accurate shift logs, incident reports, and handover notes for each duty period.
	Enforce company policies regarding restricted areas, visitor management, and safety protocols.
	Liaise with local law enforcement agencies when necessary and escalate security threats through the appropriate chain of command.
	Support the coordination of safety procedures during events, guest check-ins, and VIP visits.
	Report maintenance issues, safety hazards, or suspicious activities to management immediately.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of OND/SSCE; a diploma in Security Management or a related field is an added advantage.
	Minimum of 3 - 5 years of experience in a security role, preferably in a hospitality or service-oriented environment.
	Proven prior experience in the hospitality industry is required.
	Strong knowledge of security protocols, access control, and emergency response procedures.
	Physically fit and able to remain alert throughout a 24-hour shift rotation.
	Excellent observation, communication, and report-writing skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team under pressure.
	Must be of sound character with no criminal record.


Salary
N70,000 - N90,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications to: precious.chinonso@hopservicesltd.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note
Application Requirements:


	Valid government-issued ID (National ID, Voter&#39;s Card, or International Passport).
	At least two verifiable professional references from previous employers.
	Updated CV/Resume detailing relevant work experience.

Senior Security Officer Job at HOP Services




        
    

        
        HOP Services is a leading hospitality solutions provider based in Port Harcourt, Nigeria. We specialize in Hospitality Management and Consulting, Professional Bespoke Hospitality Training Programs through HOP Academy, and Comprehensive Cleaning Services via Certified Third parties. Our mission is to keep our environment clean and empower the hospitality sector to deliver high-quality experiences. Serve businesses across Nigeria with guaranteed quality standards, fully trained professional staff, and bespoke packages backed by a guaranteed satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Security Officer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Part-time
     

            
    



About the Role


	We are seeking a disciplined, alert, and experienced Senior Security Officer to safeguard our facilities, staff, and guests on a 24-hour rotational shift basis.
	The ideal candidate brings professionalism, integrity, and a strong sense of duty to everything they do.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and control access to company premises, ensuring only authorized personnel and guests are admitted.
	Conduct regular patrols of all assigned areas — interior and exterior — throughout the 24-hour shift cycle.
	Respond promptly and appropriately to security incidents, emergencies, alarms, and disturbances.
	Maintain accurate shift logs, incident reports, and handover notes for each duty period.
	Enforce company policies regarding restricted areas, visitor management, and safety protocols.
	Liaise with local law enforcement agencies when necessary and escalate security threats through the appropriate chain of command.
	Support the coordination of safety procedures during events, guest check-ins, and VIP visits.
	Report maintenance issues, safety hazards, or suspicious activities to management immediately.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Minimum of OND/SSCE; a diploma in Security Management or a related field is an added advantage.
	Minimum of 3 - 5 years of experience in a security role, preferably in a hospitality or service-oriented environment.
	Proven prior experience in the hospitality industry is required.
	Strong knowledge of security protocols, access control, and emergency response procedures.
	Physically fit and able to remain alert throughout a 24-hour shift rotation.
	Excellent observation, communication, and report-writing skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team under pressure.
	Must be of sound character with no criminal record.


Salary
N70,000 - N90,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note
Application Requirements:


	Valid government-issued ID (National ID, Voter's Card, or International Passport).
	At least two verifiable professional references from previous employers.
	Updated CV/Resume detailing relevant work experience.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Executive",
  "description": "At Firewood Rice Nigeria, we don&rsquo;t just serve meals - we serve memories. With a deep-rooted love for authentic Nigerian dishes, we&rsquo;ve built a brand that delivers comfort, flavor, and joy to our customers across Lagos. Our energetic team is the secret sauce behind our success, and we&rsquo;re growing fast! If you love food, innovation, and working in a vibrant, forward-thinking environment, we want you with us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Executive
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Develop daily, weekly, and monthly production schedules based on outlet demand, bulk orders, and sales forecasts.
	Manage customer inquiries via phone, email, and other channels promptly and professionally.
	Provide accurate information on menus, daily specials, pricing, and company policies.
	Handle multiple customer orders simultaneously, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and timely processing.
	Recommend products, suggest add-ons, and encourage complementary purchases to increase sales through upselling and cross-selling.
	Communicate special requests and dietary requirements clearly to the kitchen team.
	Coordinate with logistics to ensure timely dispatch and delivery of orders.
	Monitor delivery progress and update customers proactively.
	Handle customer complaints professionally, providing prompt resolution or escalating complex issues to management.
	Collect and document customer feedback to identify areas for service improvement.
	Collaborate with production, logistics, sales, and quality teams to ensure smooth operations and prevent order errors


Qualifications


	Minimum OND/HND/Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in any related field
	1&ndash;2 years of customer service experience, preferably in food production, catering, or hospitality.
	Strong communication, multitasking, and organizational skills.
	Ability to manage multiple orders under pressure without compromising accuracy or service quality.
	Customer-centric mindset with attention to detail.
	Ability to identify opportunities to increase sales while maintaining high service standards.
	Proficiency in order management systems and Microsoft Office tools.


Compensation, Scope of Work, and Benefits


	Salary: N100,000 per month
	Days of Work: Monday &ndash; Saturday
	Working Hours: 7:00 AM &ndash; 4:00 PM
	Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) coverage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: firewoodjollofcareers@gmail.com using the Job Position as subject of the email.",

Customer Service Executive Job at Firewood Rice Nigeria




        
    

        
        At Firewood Rice Nigeria, we don’t just serve meals - we serve memories. With a deep-rooted love for authentic Nigerian dishes, we’ve built a brand that delivers comfort, flavor, and joy to our customers across Lagos. Our energetic team is the secret sauce behind our success, and we’re growing fast! If you love food, innovation, and working in a vibrant, forward-thinking environment, we want you with us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Executive
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Develop daily, weekly, and monthly production schedules based on outlet demand, bulk orders, and sales forecasts.
	Manage customer inquiries via phone, email, and other channels promptly and professionally.
	Provide accurate information on menus, daily specials, pricing, and company policies.
	Handle multiple customer orders simultaneously, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and timely processing.
	Recommend products, suggest add-ons, and encourage complementary purchases to increase sales through upselling and cross-selling.
	Communicate special requests and dietary requirements clearly to the kitchen team.
	Coordinate with logistics to ensure timely dispatch and delivery of orders.
	Monitor delivery progress and update customers proactively.
	Handle customer complaints professionally, providing prompt resolution or escalating complex issues to management.
	Collect and document customer feedback to identify areas for service improvement.
	Collaborate with production, logistics, sales, and quality teams to ensure smooth operations and prevent order errors


Qualifications


	Minimum OND/HND/Bachelor’s Degree in any related field
	1–2 years of customer service experience, preferably in food production, catering, or hospitality.
	Strong communication, multitasking, and organizational skills.
	Ability to manage multiple orders under pressure without compromising accuracy or service quality.
	Customer-centric mindset with attention to detail.
	Ability to identify opportunities to increase sales while maintaining high service standards.
	Proficiency in order management systems and Microsoft Office tools.


Compensation, Scope of Work, and Benefits


	Salary: N100,000 per month
	Days of Work: Monday – Saturday
	Working Hours: 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM
	Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) coverage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Sales Executive Job at Fadac Resources and Services Limited




        
    

        
        Fadac Resources and Services Limited - From recruitment to workforce strategy, we help you build teams that grow with your vision. Let’s power your next phase of growth through people.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Executive

Job Location:  Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: ICT

Job Summary


	We are seeking a results-driven Sales Executive to drive business growth by generating new leads, managing client relationships, and closing B2B sales opportunities.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Identify and convert new business opportunities.
	Manage the sales cycle from prospecting to closing.
	Build and maintain strong client relationships.
	Conduct product demonstrations and presentations.
	Achieve sales targets and maintain CRM records.
	Collaborate with the marketing team to generate qualified leads.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
	2–4 years of B2B sales experience (SaaS, HR Tech, or ICT solutions preferred).
	Strong communication, presentation, and negotiation skills.
	Proficiency in CRM tools and digital sales techniques.
	Self-motivated with a proven ability to meet sales targets.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualifed candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Application for SALES EXECUTIVE" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
